summary: Process termination, local audit retention and aggregate token totals each hid a different operational failure mode. Elixir task death did not reap shell descendants; confirmed receipts accumulated despite GitHub being canonical; aggregate input obscured ~92.8% model cache reuse. PR creation also duplicated canonical markers when callers supplied them.
action: Fail closed on workspace deletion, checkpoint diffs, reap test children with bounded writes, collapse receipts to sequence watermarks, aggregate low-value telemetry, expose cached versus uncached tokens, require compact context first, and make PR marker generation idempotent in game-api. Continue bos-mcp memory/cache work under bos-mcp#12.
